summary: Frontend testing of new features: Device color selection and Stripe cart checkout. Both features implemented correctly.

verified_features.details: When user clicks a color in the 'Vista Rápida de Colores' section, the main device preview image changes to show the device in that color. Tested with Naranja Energy, Rosa Coral, and Plata. Each color has its own unique device image from DEVICE_COLOR_IMAGES mapping.
Cart button with data-testid='cart-btn' opens slide-in cart modal. Shows 'Tu carrito está vacío' when empty.
Backend endpoint returns valid Stripe checkout URL. Tested with Plan Premium at 9.99€ + 4.95€ shipping.
Code correctly shows 'Pagar con Stripe' button when cartTotal > 0, otherwise shows 'Finalizar Pedido' link.

color_selection.naranja_energy: Image changes to orange device - PASSED
color_selection.rosa_coral: Image changes to pink device - PASSED
color_selection.image_src_verification: Each color has unique image URL from DEVICE_COLOR_IMAGES - PASSED

stripe_checkout_api.response: Returns stripe checkout URL and session_id - PASSED

SOSServices.js: DEVICE_COLOR_IMAGES mapping at lines 33-46 contains 12 color options with unique image URLs
updateDeviceColor function at line 201 correctly updates preview
currentDeviceImage at line 217 correctly gets image for selected color
data-testid='device-preview-image' properly set on preview img element
Color option buttons have data-testid='color-option-{colorId}' for testing
LandingPage.js: Checkout button at line 414-431 correctly appears when cartTotal > 0
Note: No UI element on homepage calls addToCart - products link to other pages
payments.py: Cart checkout endpoint at lines 705-795 correctly creates Stripe session
Validates items, calculates totals, returns checkout URL

context_for_next_testing_agent: Device color preview feature on /dispositivo-sos works correctly - selecting different colors shows different device images. Cart checkout with Stripe works via backend API. The homepage cart doesn't have an 'Add to Cart' UI - products link to other pages. The Stripe checkout button (data-testid='checkout-btn') only appears when cart has items with precio > 0.
